ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the player */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_bats" TEXT /* Bats left or right */,
  "player_throws" TEXT /* Throws left or right */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "contest_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "contest_date" TEXT /* Date of the contest */,
  "contest_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest type */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the contest */,
  "max_entries" INTEGER /* Maximum number of entries allowed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the contest */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the contest */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contests_contest_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_type_id") REFERENCES contest_types ("contest_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "pa" INTEGER /* Plate appearances */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs */,
  "ip" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "er" INTEGER /* Earned runs */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "fp" REAL /* Fantasy points */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Walks (base on balls) */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts by the batter */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "sb" INTEGER /* Stolen bases */,
  "cs" INTEGER /* Caught stealing */,
  "g" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "ab" INTEGER /* At-bats */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "position_order" INTEGER /* Order of the position in the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id", "player_id", "contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "lineup_name" TEXT /* Name of the lineup */,
  "total_salary" TEXT /* Total salary of the players in the lineup */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored by the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineup_players" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineup */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player in the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id", "player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineup_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_types" (
  "contest_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest type */,
  "contest_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contest type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "entry_name" TEXT /* Name of the entry */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., active, pending, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_entries_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entry_lineups" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry */,
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id", "lineup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of the prize (e.g., cash, merchandise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "prize_claimed" INTEGER /* Whether the prize has been claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES contest_entries ("entry_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the position of the player

Total prize pool for the contest
Unique identifier for each player statistic
Order of the position in the lineup

Status of the entry (e.g., active, pending, withdrawn)
Type of the prize (e.g., cash, merchandise)
Whether the prize has been claimed
